places.name: National Museum of Qatar
places.description: The building is a gigantic piece of art inspired by the shape of a desert rose.

places.name: Souq Waqif
places.description: Qatar's oldest market can trace its origins back more than a century.

places.name: Kashmir Handicrafts Emporium
places.description: Home of the infamous Rug Man of Doha.

places.name: Bin Jelmood House
places.description: This unique museum doesn't shy away from highlighting Qatar's role in the history of slavery.

places.name: Souq Wakif Blue Road
places.description: This vibrant side road in Doha was painted light blue to reduce heat.

places.name: Qatar National Library
places.description: The enormous diamond-shaped building packs a trove of academic and literary treasures into one futuristic space.

places.name: Pearl Monument
places.description: This fountain pays homage to Qatar's history of pearling, the primary industry before oil.
